---
title: "Page Not Found"
pagetitle: "404 - ECON1550"
---

<div id="error-content">
  <div id="loading-message" style="display: none;">
    <p>Checking availability...</p>
  </div>

  <div id="release-info" style="display: none;">
    <h2 id="material-title"></h2>
    <p id="release-message"></p>
    <p><a href="materials.html">Return to Course Materials</a></p>
  </div>

  <div id="generic-404">
    <p>The page you're looking for doesn't exist or hasn't been released yet.</p>
    <p><a href="index.html">Return to Home</a> | <a href="materials.html">Course Materials</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const path = window.location.pathname;

  // URL patterns to match assignments
  const patterns = [
    // Problem set questions: /files/psets/pset1/pset1.pdf
    { regex: /\/files\/psets\/(pset\d+)\/pset\d+\.pdf$/, type: 'questions' },
    // Problem set solutions: /files/psets/pset1/pset1_solutions.pdf
    { regex: /\/files\/psets\/(pset\d+)\/pset\d+_solutions\.pdf$/, type: 'solutions' },
    // Problem set source: /files/psets/pset1/pset1-src.zip
    { regex: /\/files\/psets\/(pset\d+)\/pset\d+-src\.zip$/, type: 'questions' },
    // Lecture notes
    { regex: /\/files\/lectures\/lecture_notes\.pdf$/, type: 'questions', id: 'lecture_notes' },
    // Slides: /files/slides/01-tour-of-the-class.pdf
    { regex: /\/files\/slides\/(\d+)-([^\/]+)\.pdf$/, type: 'questions', kindPrefix: 'slides' }
  ];

  // Try to match the path
  let match = null;
  let assignmentId = null;
  let requestType = null;

  for (const pattern of patterns) {
    const m = path.match(pattern.regex);
    if (m) {
      if (pattern.id) {
        assignmentId = pattern.id;
      } else if (pattern.kindPrefix === 'slides') {
        // For slides, construct ID like slides-01-tour or slides-02-models
        const num = m[1];
        const slug = m[2];
        // Try to match against known slide IDs
        assignmentId = `slides-${num}-${slug.split('-').slice(0, 2).join('-')}`;
      } else {
        assignmentId = m[1];
      }
      requestType = pattern.type;
      match = m;
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!assignmentId) {
    // No match - show generic 404
    return;
  }

  // Show loading state
  document.getElementById('loading-message').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('generic-404').style.display = 'none';

  // Fetch release manifest
  fetch('/files/release_manifest.json')
    .then(response => {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Manifest not found');
      return response.json();
    })
    .then(manifest => {
      document.getElementById('loading-message').style.display = 'none';

      // Find the assignment
      const assignment = manifest.assignments.find(a => {
        if (a.id === assignmentId) return true;
        // For slides, try partial match
        if (assignmentId.startsWith('slides-')) {
          return a.id.startsWith(assignmentId.substring(0, 10));
        }
        return false;
      });

      if (!assignment) {
        // Assignment not in manifest - show generic 404
        document.getElementById('generic-404').style.display = 'block';
        return;
      }

      // Determine what date to show
      let releaseDate = null;
      let message = '';

      if (requestType === 'solutions') {
        if (assignment.stage === 'solutions') {
          // Solutions should be available - might be a different issue
          document.getElementById('generic-404').style.display = 'block';
          return;
        }
        releaseDate = assignment.sol_release_at_local;
        if (releaseDate) {
          message = `Solutions will be available after the deadline.`;
        } else {
          message = `Solutions for this assignment are not available.`;
        }
      } else {
        // Questions or source
        if (assignment.stage !== 'none') {
          // Should be available - might be a different issue
          document.getElementById('generic-404').style.display = 'block';
          return;
        }
        releaseDate = assignment.pre_release_at_local;
        if (releaseDate) {
          message = `This material will be released soon.`;
        } else {
          message = `This material has not been scheduled for release.`;
        }
      }

      // Format the date nicely
      if (releaseDate) {
        const date = new Date(releaseDate);
        const options = {
          weekday: 'long',
          year: 'numeric',
          month: 'long',
          day: 'numeric',
          hour: 'numeric',
          minute: '2-digit',
          timeZoneName: 'short'
        };
        const formatted = date.toLocaleString('en-US', options);
        message = `Available on <strong>${formatted}</strong>`;
      }

      // Show release info
      document.getElementById('material-title').textContent = assignment.title;
      document.getElementById('release-message').innerHTML = message;
      document.getElementById('release-info').style.display = 'block';
    })
    .catch(error => {
      // Error fetching manifest - show generic 404
      document.getElementById('loading-message').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('generic-404').style.display = 'block';
    });
})();
</script>

<style>
#error-content {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

#material-title {
  color: #2c3e50;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

#release-message {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

#release-info {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 2rem;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

#generic-404 {
  color: #6c757d;
}

#loading-message {
  color: #6c757d;
  font-style: italic;
}
</style>
